text: Jab unhone kaha ki shehar aakar main badal gayi hoon, toh mera dimaag sunn ho gaya aur bas rona nikal pada, ab potey ke school rejection ki baat kaise chedun? Mere andar bas ek hulchul si machi hai aur lag raha hai jaise sab khatam ho gaya, mujhe samajh hi nahi aa raha ki main kya bolun ya kya sochun. Bas unki woh baat kaante ki tarah chubhi ja rahi hai aur main bas siskiyan liye ja rahi hoon.

Bahu ki baat sunkar mere hosh udd gaye aur main bas deewar ko takti reh gayi, abhi toh bache ki bimari ka bojh hi nahi sambhal raha tha. Hospital ka kharcha aur 'log kya kahenge' wale darr ke beech unki ye baat sunkar mera dum ghutne laga hai. Abhi mujhse koi ghar ka solution mat pucho, mera dil itna bhara hua hai ki bas cheekh kar rone ka mann kar raha hai.

Unke 'badal gayi ho' bolte hi main bilakh uthi aur purani sari baatein dimaag mein bheed lagakar aa gayi jahan mujhe hi potey ki disability ke liye blame kiya gaya tha. Bacha bimar hai, koi school lene ko taiyaar nahi aur upar se parivaar ka ye naya taana—mujhe toh lag raha hai main pagal ho jaungi. Abhi main koi dawai ya treatment nahi soch sakti, bas ye rona ruk hi nahi raha.

Jab bete ne shehar ki hawa lagne ki baat ki, toh mera dil baith gaya aur main bas kursi par dher ho gayi. Ghar mein waise hi sab mujhe 'dependent' samajhte hain aur ab unki ye baatein sunkar mera poora sharir thanda pad gaya hai. Main abhi kuch nahi kar sakti, bas ek ajeeb si ghabrahat ho rahi hai aur aankhon se dhaar beh rahi hai.

Unki baat sunkar meri toh aatma kaanp gayi, jaise kisi ne mere akelepan aur health ka mazaak udaya ho. Main ghar mein ignore hokar thak chuki hoon, par ab rone ke alawa kuch sujh nahi raha ki potey ko school kaise bhejein. Abhi mujhse mat pucho aage kya hoga, mera dimaag itna bhara hai ki main bas rona chahti hoon.
